faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: Customers can request a refund within 14 days of purchase. After 14 days, refunds are not eligible unless required by law.

faqs.question: How long does support take to respond?
faqs.answer: Our support team typically responds within 24 to 48 hours depending on the complexity of the issue.

faqs.question: How can I reset my password?
faqs.answer: You can reset your password by clicking on 'Forgot Password' on the login page and following the instructions sent to your email.

faqs.question: Do you offer 24/7 support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 support for premium customers. Standard customers receive business-hours support.

policies.title: Refund Policy
policies.content: Refunds are only applicable within 14 days of purchase. Digital services once consumed are non-refundable unless service failure is proven.

policies.title: Data Privacy Policy
policies.content: We ensure all customer data is encrypted and stored securely. We do not share personal data with third parties without consent.

policies.title: Account Suspension Policy
policies.content: Accounts may be suspended for violations including fraud, abuse, or violation of terms of service.

supportTickets.resolution: Refund processed manually after verification within SLA.

supportTickets.issue: Login issue due to password reset failure
supportTickets.resolution: Password reset link reissued and issue resolved.
Ticket escalated and response delivered within 24 hours.

sampleAIResponses.response: We understand your concern. As per our policy, refunds are available within 14 days of purchase. Please share your order details for assistance.
Your account may be locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please reset your password or contact support for assistance.
